mapper.sql: id, name, category, measurement_unit, equivalent_value, equal_value, low_heat_value, carbon_content, oxidation_rate, color, is_active, sort_order, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM bs_energy_catalog WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM bs_energy_catalog WHERE category = #{category} AND is_active = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order, id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bs_energy_catalog ( name, category, measurement_unit, equivalent_value, equal_value, low_heat_value, carbon_content, oxidation_rate, color, is_active, sort_order, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{category}, #{measurementUnit}, #{equivalentValue}, #{equalValue}, #{lowHeatValue}, #{carbonContent}, #{oxidationRate}, #{color}, #{isActive}, #{sortOrder}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE bs_energy_catalog
update_time = NOW(), update_by = #{updateBy}, name = #{name}, category = #{category}, measurement_unit = #{measurementUnit}, equivalent_value = #{equivalentValue}, equal_value = #{equalValue}, low_heat_value = #{lowHeatValue}, carbon_content = #{carbonContent}, oxidation_rate = #{oxidationRate}, color = #{color}, is_active = #{isActive}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, remark = #{remark},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
